title: The Kia Telluride Hybrid Just Landed. An EREV Option Arrives In 2029
content: Kia announced two extended-range electric vehicles hitting the U.S. by 2030, including a version of the Telluride.

title: These EV Fast Chargers Are Completely Off-Grid—And Free
content: Thanks to a huge solar array and a 3.4 MWh battery, this California EV charging station doesn’t need a grid connection.

title: Car Buyers Don't Like Subscriptions. Car Companies Are Pushing Them For Driver-Assistance Tech Anyway.
content: Automakers are chasing software revenue, but the state of the tech has consumers second-guessing its value.
